## Summary

## Type of Change

- [ ] Skill (analysis or orchestration)
- [ ] Agent definition
- [ ] Hook / Plugin fix
- [ ] Multi-platform support
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure (scripts, validation)

## Verification

- [ ] `bash scripts/validate.sh` passes
- [ ] Tested on relevant platform(s): Claude Code / OpenCode / Codex
- [ ] If new skill: description starts with "Use when", has output contract
- [ ] If cloned skill: `bash scripts/build-upstream-skills.sh` transforms correctly
